---
name: Bug Report
about: A skill isn't producing the expected agent behavior
labels: bug
---

<!--
BEFORE FILING: Search open AND closed issues. If your issue already
exists, add a comment or reaction to the existing one instead.
-->

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate

## Which skill is affected?

<!-- Name the skill directory, e.g. `skills/systematic-debugging` -->

## Environment (required)

<!-- Required. We weigh reports differently based on what produced them. -->

| Field                               | Value |
| ----------------------------------- | ----- |
| Raised by (human / agent)           |       |
| Harness (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) |       |
| Harness version                     |       |
| Model + version                     |       |
| Plugins installed                   |       |

## Is this a skill issue or a platform issue?

<!--
Some reported "bugs" are actually model behavior or platform issues
unrelated to the skill content. If you're not sure, try loading the
skill in a different harness or with a different model to compare.
-->

- [ ] I verified the issue is specific to this skill, not the underlying platform

## What happened?

<!-- Be specific. Describe what the agent did wrong. "It didn't work" is not a bug report. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Expected agent behavior

<!-- What should the agent have done with this skill loaded? -->

## Actual agent behavior

<!-- What did the agent do instead? -->

## Conversation transcript or evidence

     This is the single most helpful thing you can include. Without it, we're guessing. -->
